data.title: Lear Corp Crushes Earnings: Seating, E-Systems Drive 24% Profit Jump
data.description: Lear Corp, listed on NYSE as LEA, released their fiscal first-quarter results, reporting a revenue of $5.82 billion, a 5% increase from the previous year. Analysts had anticipated a slightly higher revenue of $5.84 billion. The company exceeded expectations with a quarterly adjusted EPS of $3.87, marking a 24% increase year-over-year, surpassing the analyst consensus of $3.52. Lear Corp primarily operates as a Tier 1 supplier to the global automotive industry, specializing in automotive seating and E-Systems. In the first quarter, global vehicle production saw a 3% decline, with North America down by 2%, Europe by 1%, and China by 10%. However, on a Lear sales-weighted basis, global production actually increased by 3%, influenced by the company's fiscal calendar. Lear recorded $5.8 billion in sales during the quarter, up by 5% compared to the previous year. Excluding various factors like commodities, foreign exchange, and acquisitions, sales grew by 3%, propelled by...

data.title: New Data Links Rising Youth Gambling and Screen Time to Mental Health Risks
data.description: Change the Game Ohio raises awareness about the dangers of youth gambling and promotes available parent resources throughout the year during Mental Health Awareness Month in Ohio. According to a survey conducted by Common Sense Media, 36% of boys aged 11 to 17 have engaged in gambling activities. This initiative aims to educate parents and caregivers about the risks associated with underage gambling and provide support to prevent and address such behaviors.

data.title: Dental Care Alliance Celebrates "Amazing in '26" at President's Club, Honoring Top Providers in New Orleans
data.description: In Sarasota, Florida on May 1, 2026, Dental Care Alliance (DCA), a prominent dental support organization in the United States, celebrated its standout providers and leaders at the 2026 President's Club event from April 24-26 in New Orleans. This event showcased the top achievers within the organization and highlighted their contributions to the dental industry.

data.title: Urban One Announces Agreements to Acquire Dallas Radio Stations KKDA and KRNB and to Sell KZMJ
data.description: A media company based in Silver Spring, Maryland, has recently announced on May 1, 2026, that Urban One has finalized a deal to purchase Service Broadcasting Group, LLC. This acquisition includes the popular radio stations KKDA and KRNB. As part of this agreement, Urban One has also made plans to divest radio station KZMJ to Fuzion Dallas, LLC. These transactions mark a significant move in the industry as Urban One expands its radio portfolio, while also selling one station to another entity for an undisclosed amount.

data.title: Rezolute Announces Oral Presentation of Results From its Phase 3 sunRIZE Study of Ersodetug in Patients with Congenital Hyperinsulinism at the Pediatric Endocrine Society Annual Meeting
data.description: The latest data from continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) studies have shown notable enhancements in glycemic control with ersodetug treatment versus placebo. These improvements were seen across various predefined and additional endpoints, indicating significant and consistent benefits in managing blood sugar levels.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Inches Up With Help From Apple; Reddit Rallies (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced a boost driven by Apple's positive earnings report, leading to an increase. However, there was a decline in a drug stock. The overall market showed a slight upward trend, with the Reddit community also contributing to some stock rallies. The live coverage of the stock market today highlighted these movements, with the Dow Jones index inching up with the support from Apple's performance and the engagement of Reddit investors.

data.title: UPDATE – eXp World Holdings to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on May 11, 2026
data.description: Corporate management will be reviewing the financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 and holding a virtual event to conduct an investor question and answer session. This event will provide an opportunity for stakeholders to engage with management and gain insights into the company's performance during the period. The first quarter results, including key financial figures such as revenue, profit, and expenses, will be presented and discussed during the event. Additionally, investors will have the chance to pose questions and receive clarifications on any aspects of the company's performance.
